The Computer Labs consists of Licensed Software under Microsoft campus agreement. All computer labs are established in Client Server Architecture. Impact Traning Centre CSE LAB-129 CSE LAB-130 CSE LAB-131 CSE LAB-132 CSE LAB-133 CSE LAB-428 CSE LAB-528 CSE LAB-529 Impact Training Centre This center is a modern facility with 250 + high-performance Intel Core i7 9th Generation All-in-One systems, designed to train students in cutting-edge technologies and placement-oriented skills. It integrates the latest methodologies in coding, networking, and application development by providing platforms for Python, C, C++, JAVA and advanced algorithmic problem-solving. With industry-standard tools like Cisco Packet Tracer and modern networking devices, students gain real-time exposure to network configuration and security practices. The lab also emphasizes contemporary domains such as Data Mining and Big Data Analytics, Full Stack Development for scalable web solutions, Operating Systems concepts for system-level understanding, and Flutter for cross-platform mobile application and UI design. By combining academic rigor with industry-relevant tools, the lab ensures students are equipped with the most in-demand skills to meet evolving technological and placement requirements. Equipped with high-performance systems and advanced tools, the lab supports a wide range of academic courses including Advanced Data Structures and Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming through Java, Database Management Systems, and Full Stack Development. It also facilitates hands-on practice in specialized domains such as Deep Learning, Data Mining, Big Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, and Data Visualization. With a strong focus on modern development frameworks, students gain practical exposure to User Interface Design using Flutter, Android Application Development, and SWAYAM Plus modules for self-paced learning. By integrating artificial intelligence with programming, database management, and application development, the AIML Lab empowers students to build intelligent systems, analyze complex datasets, and design innovative solutions aligned with current industry trends.
